summary.safe_command_policy: Only python3 scripts/* commands with --dry-run, or reschedule previews without --apply, are executed.
summary.mutation_guardrail: This preview runner never executes apply, refresh-admin, PUBLIC_URL placeholder, non-python, or unsupported commands.
